meaning: n.小片,废料,剪下来的图片,文章,残余物,废料,打架vt.扔弃,敲碎,拆毁vi.互相殴打adj.零碎的,废弃的
examples: There's always tons of scrap paper in Dad's office.
Thousands of Europe's tanks and guns are going to the scrap heap.
It won't make a scrap of difference.
Ely says one KPMG client, a California business owner, had already turned over every scrap of paper requested.
Some 55% of Australians backed the status quo, while 45% voted to scrap the constitutional monarchy.
